expectations.text: Identifies affected-only builds as the primary fix
expectations.evidence: Section 1 titled 'Run affected-only Turborepo tasks (biggest win)', explicitly labeled as #1

expectations.text: Provides turbo --filter command or GitHub Actions conditional logic
expectations.evidence: turbo run build test lint --filter=...[origin/main] plus dorny/paths-filter for docs-only fast path

expectations.text: Mentions remote caching with setup instructions
expectations.evidence: Section 2 with TURBO_TOKEN/TURBO_TEAM env vars, plus dry-run verification command

expectations.text: Includes shallow clone (fetch-depth) recommendation for CI
expectations.evidence: Section 4: recommends fetch-depth: 50 for affected-detection jobs (informed middle ground from skill), fetch-depth: 1 for non-diff jobs

expectations.text: Provides at least one concrete YAML or config snippet
expectations.evidence: Full CI YAML with docs-only fast path, turbo.json with input exclusions, parallel workflow YAML, sparse checkout YAML
Numbered 1-6: affected-only > remote cache > input exclusions > git checkout > parallelization > merge queue
